## Proposed Change

- Suggested category or reorganization:
- Affected file(s):
- Related existing sections:

## Why This Helps

Explain how this improves discoverability, curation quality, teaching value, research use, or practitioner navigation.

## Suggested Entries or Links

List representative resources that would belong in this category, if any.

## Checklist

- [ ] I checked that a similar category does not already exist.
- [ ] The category would contain multiple high-quality resources.
- [ ] The proposed change improves navigation rather than adding clutter.
